seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Eradu South and Esperance. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Eradu South vs Esperance: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Eradu South and Esperance.
heading: Eradu South vs Esperance — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Eradu South, Western Australia and Esperance, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Eradu South has a lower overall climate risk score (26/100) compared to Esperance (33/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Eradu South or Esperance safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Eradu South has a flood risk score of 21/100, while Esperance scores 32/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Eradu South scores 18/100 for bushfire risk. Esperance scores 26/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Eradu South or Esperance?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Eradu South has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.45% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
